---
title: "Activity 3/23"
author: "Steph Krieger"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
prisons <- read.csv("Prison_Boundaries.csv")
```

```{r}
x1 <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
x2 <- c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e")
x3 <- c(TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE)

mean(x2 + x3)
```

Question #4:

FID, FACILITYID, ZIP, ZIP4, COUNTYFIPS, NAICS_CODE should all be charecters

SOURCEDATE, VAL_DATE, CREATION_DATE, EDIT_DATE should all be dates

```{r}
sapply(prisons, typeof)
```

Question #5:

```{r}
as.character(prisons$FID)
as.character(prisons$NAICS_CODE)
```

Question #6:

```{r}
library(lubridate)

prisons <- prisons |>
  mutate(EditDate = ydm_hms(EditDate))

prisons <- prisons |>
  mutate(CreationDate = ydm_hms(CreationDate))
```
